title: Opsgenie provider config
description: Configuration shape for an Opsgenie alerts integration. Requires monitoring_paging entitlement (Medium+).

api_key.description: Opsgenie API integration key. Encrypted at rest. Sent as 'GenieKey <api_key>' in the Authorization header.

team_id.description: Opsgenie team ID (UUID) to route alerts to. Every dispatch adds this to the responders array.

region.description: Opsgenie deployment region. us = api.opsgenie.com; eu = api.eu.opsgenie.com.

priority_map.description: Optional per-severity priority mapping. Defaults: p1→P1, p2→P2, p3→P3, p4→P5 (P4 in Opsgenie is 'urgent' — we skip it for P4).

default_tags.description: Optional default tags applied to every dispatched alert. Example: ['production', 'monitoring'].

auto_close_on_signal_clear.description: true = when the monitoring alert resolves, dispatch an Opsgenie 'close' request with the same alias. false = leave Opsgenie alerts to manual close.

alias_prefix.description: Optional prefix for the alert alias (Opsgenie's dedup key). Alerts on the same policy dedupe via alias = prefix + policy_id.
